title: Lead SEO Specialist at Fire-Boltt International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Fire-Boltt International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fire-Boltt International Enterprises:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
